figures.caption: TABLE I. Strain dependence of the in-plane spin conductivity |𝜎𝑠 ⊢ | = |𝜎𝑧 ∥ | = |𝜎𝑧 ⊥ |, the out-of-plane spin conductivity |𝜎n̂ ⇑ |, and the corresponding charge-to-spin conversion efficiencies |CSE| (inplane) and |CSE⇑ | (out-of-plane) for KV2Se2O. All spin conductivities are in units of (ℏ/2𝑒) S/cm.

TABLE II. Strain-dependent optimal orientations and the corresponding CSEn̂ or in KV2Se2O. For the (011) orientation, the new 𝑥′ axis (electric-field direction) is [011̄] and the new 𝑦′ axis is [1̄00]; for (111), 𝑥′ = [01̄1] and 𝑦′ = [21̄1]. The angles 𝜃 and 𝜑 define the direction of E in the original crystal frame.
